words: To Him belongs what is in the heavens
puzzle.arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْحَيُّ ٱلْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلْأَرْضِ
puzzle.hint: This verse emphasizes the uniqueness and oneness of Allah, highlighting His eternal nature and sovereignty.
